dashboard.kpi8PaceGapDesc: Actual achievement % − time progress %. Positive = ahead of pace, negative = behind.
dashboard.kpi8RemainDailyDesc: Daily output needed to hit monthly target, spread across remaining workdays.
dashboard.kpi8PaceDailyDesc: Daily output needed to catch up with time progress (more urgent than target).
dashboard.kpi8EfficiencyDesc: % increase needed in current daily pace to hit monthly target.
dashboard.funnelEmptyDesc: Please upload this month's Excel data (A1 snapshot) — auto-refresh on upload.

dashboard.totalStudentsSub: Students who have paid and are within validity — the base for this month's referral ops.
dashboard.newCoeffSub: Avg registrations per participating A-student. >2 is excellent.
dashboard.cargoRatioSub: Students with registrations / total active students. Measures referral penetration.
dashboard.participationRateSub: Students with referrals / total active students.
dashboard.checkinRateSub: Students who shared referral codes / active students. Green ≥50%, Orange 30-50%, Red <30%.
dashboard.ccReachRateSub: CC effective calls (≥20s) students / total active students.
dashboard.bmTooltipCumBm: Monthly target × BM progress % (cumulative baseline through T-1)
dashboard.bmTooltipActual: Actual cumulative achieved as of yesterday
dashboard.bmTooltipGap: Actual − Cumulative BM: positive = ahead, negative = behind
dashboard.bmTooltipTodayBm: Monthly target × today's BM % (today's benchmark quota)
dashboard.bmTooltipTodayReq: Remaining × (today's BM% ÷ remaining BM%): today's specific required output
dashboard.bmTooltipDailyAvg: (Monthly target − actual) ÷ remaining workdays: avg daily needed
dashboard.bmFooter: BM Gap = T-1 Actual − Cumulative BM. Today's Required = daily needed to catch BM pace (negative = already exceeded, no extra effort needed).
dashboard.anomalyAchieveLow: Monthly achievement {pct}%, still below 70% past mid-month

CoPilotTerminal.title: Co-pilot Terminal
CoPilotTerminal.welcome:
Hi! I'm your ref-ops Team Agent. I have full context of all 35 data sources and live KPIs. Try asking me:

- Why is the referral revenue dropping this week?
- Show me the top 3 CCs in D31-60 enclosure.
- Can we hit this month's target?
CoPilotTerminal.mockReply: I've analyzed the recent snapshots via MCP. It appears there's a 15% drop in D61-90 enclosure conversions specifically for the SS team due to lower outreach compliance. I recommend triggering a targeted Reactivation campaign. Shall I draft the campaign brief?
